CONTENT.Career: Pieringer made his professional debut for Würzburger Kickers in the 2. Bundesliga on 6 January 2021, starting in the home match against FC St. Pauli. He scored a penalty in the 9th minute of the match, which finished as a 1–1 draw.On 25 June 2021, Pieringer  agreed to join Schalke 04 on loan for the 2021–22 season with an option to make the move permanent. On 12 May 2022, Schalke exercised this option.On 28 July 2022, he joined SC Paderborn on a season-long loan.On 3 July 2023, Pieringer signed with 1. FC Heidenheim, which promoted to the Bundesliga.
CONTENT.External links: Marvin Pieringer at DFB (also available in German)Marvin Pieringer at kicker (in German)

SUMMARY: Marvin Pieringer (born 4 October 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays as a forward or attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Heidenheim.
